caption: A man with dark skin is seated in a studio, wearing a tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders. He wears over-ear headphones and sits before a professional black microphone. The background consists of a white wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and a clothing rack with a garment featuring the word "LEE" visible. On-screen text includes a logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, slightly tilting his head and shifting his facial expression while appearing to speak into the microphone. The lighting and camera angle remain constant throughout the sequence, focusing on his upper body and head.
